#+TITLE: Keyword Edge Cases
#+AUTHOR: Test Author
#+DATE: 2024-01-15
#+EMAIL: test@example.com
#+LANGUAGE: en
#+OPTIONS: toc:2 num:t
#+STARTUP: overview
#+FILETAGS: :project:test:
#+TAGS: urgent(u) important(i) project test
#+TAGS: { @work(w) @home(h) }
#+TAGS: [ Context : @Office @Remote ]
#+TODO: TODO WAITING | DONE CANCELLED
#+SEQ_TODO: DRAFT REVIEW | PUBLISHED
#+PRIORITIES: A C B
#+CATEGORY: testing
#+PROPERTY: header-args :results output
#+ARCHIVE: archive.org::

* Keyword spacing issues

#+TITLE:No space after colon
#+AUTHOR:  Extra spaces after colon
#+DATE:    Many spaces

* Unknown keywords (lint info)

#+FOOBAR: unknown keyword
#+TYPO_TITLE: did they mean TITLE?
#+SETUP_FILE: typo of SETUPFILE

* Affiliated keywords

#+CAPTION: A table caption
#+NAME: my-table
| a | b |
| c | d |

#+CAPTION: Caption for code block
#+NAME: my-code
#+ATTR_LATEX: :width 0.5\textwidth
#+BEGIN_SRC python
print("hello")
#+END_SRC

* Orphaned affiliated keywords (no target after them)

#+CAPTION: This caption has no target below it

Some text that is not a valid target.

#+NAME: orphaned-name

* Affiliated keyword with blank line before target

#+CAPTION: Caption with blank line

| a | b |

* Lowercase keywords

#+title: lowercase title
#+author: lowercase author

* Include and setupfile

#+SETUPFILE: ./setup.org
#+INCLUDE: "other.org" src org

* Macro definitions

#+MACRO: version 1.0.0
#+MACRO: author John Doe

* Export keywords

#+EXPORT_FILE_NAME: output
#+LATEX_HEADER: \usepackage{amsmath}
#+HTML_HEAD: <style>body{font-family:sans-serif}</style>

* Keywords inside blocks (should be ignored)

#+BEGIN_SRC org
#+TITLE: Not a real title
#+FOOBAR: Not a real keyword
#+END_SRC
